user.title: Set up FoxESS Cloud
user.description: Enter your FoxESS API key. The integration will discover all inverters available to that account.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the FoxESS API.
error.device_not_found: The serial number was not found for this API key.
error.invalid_auth: The API key was rejected by FoxESS.
error.invalid_request: FoxESS rejected the request format or headers. Update the integration and try again.
error.multiple_devices: More than one device was found. Enter the device serial number and submit again.
error.no_devices: No FoxESS devices were returned for this API key.

abort.already_configured: This FoxESS inverter is already configured.
abort.already_configured_account: This FoxESS account is already configured.
